name: Deep Mehta
title: Systems, Backend & AI Engineering Student
shortHeadline: CS student focused on backend infrastructure, AI systems, distributed software, production-oriented engineering, and scalable backend architecture.
bio: Computer Science student focused on backend infrastructure, AI systems, distributed software, and production-oriented engineering. Interested in how scalable systems are architected — from API design and database modeling to distributed coordination and system behavior under load. Builds practical projects across the backend-AI spectrum, from research intelligence pipelines to retrieval-augmented generation platforms. Works through problems methodically across DSA platforms. Curious about operating systems, computer networks, distributed consensus, and what makes production systems reliable.

identity.portfolioMessage: A student engineer focused on building production-quality backend systems, exploring AI infrastructure patterns, and developing scalable software through consistent engineering practice.

projectFocus: Building Resyntha and Atlas as flagship projects

Solving algorithmic problems and exploring system internals
